Class WaitingListEntry

java.lang.Object
Entities.WaitingListEntry
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class WaitingListEntry extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an entry in the restaurant waiting list. Contains information about the user or guest, contact details, number of guests, confirmation code, waiting date and time, exit reason, and current waiting status.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private int
    confirmationCode
    Confirmation code for this entry.
    private String
    Email
    Email of the user or phone as a fallback.
    private ExitReason
    exitReason
    Reason why the customer left the waiting list.
    private int
    numOfGuests
    Number of guests in this reservation.
    private String
    phone
    Phone number of the user or guest.
    private WaitingStatus
    status
    Current waiting status (WAITING, NOTIFIED, SEATED).
    private Integer
    userID
    The user ID, null if the entry belongs to a guest.
    private LocalDate
    WaitDate
    Date the user is waiting for.
    private LocalTime
    WaitTime
    Time the user is waiting for.

    WaitingListEntry(Integer userID, String email, String phone, int numOfGuests, int confirmationCode, LocalDate waitDate, LocalTime waitTime, ExitReason exitReason)

  • Field Details

    • userID

      private Integer userID
      The user ID, null if the entry belongs to a guest.

    • Email

      private String Email
      Email of the user or phone as a fallback.

    • phone

      private String phone
      Phone number of the user or guest.

    • numOfGuests

      private int numOfGuests
      Number of guests in this reservation.

    • confirmationCode

      private int confirmationCode
      Confirmation code for this entry.

    • WaitDate

      private LocalDate WaitDate
      Date the user is waiting for.

    • WaitTime

      private LocalTime WaitTime
      Time the user is waiting for.

    • exitReason

      private ExitReason exitReason
      Reason why the customer left the waiting list.

    • status

      private WaitingStatus status
      Current waiting status (WAITING, NOTIFIED, SEATED).

  • Constructor Details

    • WaitingListEntry

      public WaitingListEntry(Integer userID, String email, String phone, int numOfGuests, int confirmationCode, LocalDate waitDate, LocalTime waitTime, ExitReason exitReason, WaitingStatus status)
      Constructs a waiting list entry with all fields.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user, null for guests
      email - the user's email
      phone - the user's phone
      numOfGuests - number of guests
      confirmationCode - the confirmation code
      waitDate - the date the user is waiting for
      waitTime - the time the user is waiting for
      exitReason - reason why the customer left
      status - current waiting status

    • WaitingListEntry

      public WaitingListEntry(Integer userID, String email, String phone, int numOfGuests, int confirmationCode, LocalDate waitDate, LocalTime waitTime, ExitReason exitReason)
      Constructs a waiting list entry without specifying the status.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user, null for guests
      email - the user's email
      phone - the user's phone
      numOfGuests - number of guests
      confirmationCode - the confirmation code
      waitDate - the date the user is waiting for
      waitTime - the time the user is waiting for
      exitReason - reason why the customer left
